channel.title: Dropout Presents
channel.description: Latest releases from Dropout Presents on Dropout.tv

item.title: Get Your Act Together with Mark Vigeant
item.description:
Mark Vigeant talks about his improv beginnings and the inspiration for The Best Man Show.

Duration: 10:47

Tags: Dropout Presents, stand up comedy, improv, laughing, mark vigeant, weddings, speeches, marriage, relationships, love and romance, loneliness, toxic masculinity, existentialism, absurd, chaos, off the rails, kelly song, sam reich, behind the scenes
